subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department shall consider the following factors when developing transportation projects that involve the construction, reconstruction, rehabilitation, or resurfacing of a highway, other than a maintenance resurfacing project:
the extent to which the project promotes safety;
the economy of maintenance of the project;
the impact of the project on:

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: the scenic and aesthetic character of the area in which the project is located;

subsections.label: D
subsections.text: each affected local community and its economy;
the access for other modes of transportation, including those that promote physically active communities; and
except as provided by Subsection (c), the aesthetic character of the project, including input from each affected local community.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The commission shall adopt rules to implement this section.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: Subsection (a)(6) does not apply to transportation projects that involve the rehabilitation or resurfacing of a bridge or highway.
